---
title: "Map"
author: "Rebecca Martinez"
date: "2025-12-17"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}


install.packages("tibble")
install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("maps")
install.packages("ggspatial")
install.packages("geodata")
install.packages("terra")
install.packages("sf")
install.packages("ggmap")
install.packages("prettymapr")
install.packages("patchwork")
install.packages("cowplot")
install.packages("tigris")
install.packages("ggdraw")
install.packages("ra")

install.packages("tmap", repos = c("https://r-tmap.r-universe.dev",
                                   "https://cloud.r-project.org"))


library(raster)
library(tmap) 
library(tigris)
library(patchwork)
library(terra)
library(ggspatial)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(maps)
library(geodata)
library(ggmap)
library(prettymapr)
library(cowplot)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

```


```{r basic map}

tmap_mode("plot")

# --- boundaries ---
states <- states(cb = TRUE, resolution = "20m", year = 2022)
california <- states[states$STUSPS == "CA", ]

# --- sites ---
sites_df <- data.frame(
  site = c("Sedgwick Reserve", "Santa Cruz Island Reserve"),
  lon  = c(-120.04, -119.73),
  lat  = c(34.70,  34.00)
)

sites_sf <- st_as_sf(sites_df, coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)

# --- main CA map ---
ca_map <-
  tm_shape(california) +
  tm_borders(lwd = 1.2) +

  tm_shape(sites_sf) +
  tm_symbols(
    shape  = "site",
    shapes = c(21, 24),   # circle + triangle (filled shapes)
    size   = 0.8
  ) +

  tm_scale_bar(position = c("left", "bottom"), text.size = 0.7) +

  tm_layout(
    frame = FALSE,
    legend.position = c("center", "bottom")
  )

# --- mini USA locator (CA bolded) ---
usa_locator <-
  tm_shape(states) +
  tm_fill(col = "gray90") +
  tm_borders(col = "white", lwd = 0.3) +

  tm_shape(california) +
  tm_fill(col = "gray40") +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 1.2) +

  tm_layout(frame = FALSE)


if (packageVersion("tmap") >= "4.0.0") {

  final_map <- ca_map +
    tm_inset(
      usa_locator,
      width = 0.35, height = 0.35,
      position = c("left", "top")
    )

} else {

  library(grid)

  final_map <- tmap_arrange(
    ca_map,
    insets_tm = list(usa_locator),
    insets_vp = list(
      viewport(x = 0.18, y = 0.86, width = 0.35, height = 0.35, just = c("left", "top"))
    )
  )

}

final_map


```





```{r}

ggplot() +
  geom_raster(
    data = as.data.frame(dem_ca, xy = TRUE),
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = elevation),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "white",
    high = "gray60",
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = california,
    fill = NA,
    color = "gray60",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = sites_sf,
    shape = 21,
    size = 4,
    fill = "black"
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = california,
    geom = "text",
    aes(label = "California"),
    angle = -90,
    size = 4.5,
    color = "gray30",
    fontface = "italic"
  ) +
  annotation_scale(
    location = "bl",
    width_hint = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(title = "Study Site Locations") +
  theme_void(base_size = 12)



```



```{r}

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = california, fill = "palegreen", color = "gray60") +
  geom_sf(
    data = sites_sf,
    aes(shape = site),
    size = 4,
    color = "black"
  ) +
   geom_sf_text(
    data = california,
    label = "California",
    angle = -55,
    size = 4.5,
    color = "gray30",
    fontface = "italic"
   ) +
   annotation_scale(
    location = "bl",
    width_hint = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_void(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


```


```{r}

ggplot() +
  annotation_map_tile(
    type = "osm",
    zoom = 6
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = california,
    fill = NA,
    color = "gray40",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = sites_sf,
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    fill = "black",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  annotation_scale(location = "bl", width_hint = 0.2) +
  theme_void(base_size = 12)

```


```{r}


 

ggplot() +
  # --- US background ---
  geom_sf(
    data = states,
    fill = "gray80",
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.2
  ) +

  # --- California highlight ---
  geom_sf(
    data = california,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.6,
    alpha = 0.2
  ) +

  # --- Sites ---
  geom_sf(
    data = sites_sf,
    aes(shape = site),
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +

  # --- California label ---
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = -120,
    y = 37.5,
    label = "California",
    angle = -55,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "gray30",
    fontface = "italic"
  ) +

  # --- Scale bar ---
  annotation_scale(
    location = "bl",
    width_hint = .1
  ) +

  theme_void(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )


```

```{r}


# static plotting
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
tmap_mode("plot")

# state boundaries
states <- states(cb = TRUE, resolution = "20m", year = 2022)

# lower 48 only
states48 <- states[!states$STUSPS %in% c("AK", "HI"), ]

# California
california <- states48[states48$STUSPS == "CA", ]

# site colors (MUST match site names exactly)
site_cols <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island" = "#386641",  # deep green
  "Sedgwick Reserve"  = "orange4"   # brown-orange
)

# site shapes (distinct but simple)
site_shapes <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island" = 21,  # filled circle
  "Sedgwick Reserve"  = 24   # filled triangle
)

# plot
tm_shape(states48) +
  tm_fill(col = "gray92") +                 # US background
  tm_borders(col = "white", lwd = 0.3) +

  tm_shape(california) +
  tm_fill(col = "gray85") +                 # subtle CA fill
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 1.3) +    # bold CA outline

  tm_shape(sites_sf) +
  tm_symbols(
    fill = "site",
    shape = "site",
    fill.scale = tm_scale(values = site_cols),
    shape.scale = tm_scale(values = site_shapes),
    col = "black",
    size = 0.5
  ) +
   tm_view(bbox = ca_bbox) +

  # --- scale bar & north arrow ---
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), text.size = 0.7) +
  tm_compass(
    type = "arrow",
    position = c("right", "top"),
    size = 2
  ) +

  tm_layout(
    frame = FALSE,
    legend.position = c("center", "bottom"),
    legend.title.size = 0.9,
    legend.text.size = 0.8
  )

```




```{r}
# static plotting
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
tmap_mode("plot")

# state boundaries
states <- states(cb = TRUE, resolution = "20m", year = 2022)

# lower 48 only
states48 <- states[!states$STUSPS %in% c("AK", "HI"), ]

# California
california <- states48[states48$STUSPS == "CA", ]

# California bbox (for zoom effect)
ca_bbox <- st_bbox(california)

# site colors (names must match exactly)
site_cols <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island" = "#386641",
  "Sedgwick Reserve"  = "orange4"
)

# site shapes
site_shapes <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island" = 21,
  "Sedgwick Reserve"  = 24
)

tm_shape(states48) +
  tm_fill(col = "gray92") +
  tm_borders(col = "white", lwd = 0.3) +

  tm_shape(california) +
  tm_fill(col = "gray85") +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 1.3) +

  tm_shape(sites_sf) +
   tm_symbols(
    fill = "site",
    shape = "site",
    fill.scale = tm_scale(values = site_cols),
    shape.scale = tm_scale(values = site_shapes),
    col = "black",
    size = 0.5,
    shape.legend = tm_legend_hide()   # <- suppress second legend
  ) +

  # zoom to California
  tm_view(bbox = ca_bbox + c(-15, -10, 20, 10)) +

  # scale bar & north arrow
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), text.size = 0.7) +
  tm_compass(
    type = "arrow",
    position = c("right", "top"),
    size = 2
  ) +

  tm_layout(
    frame = FALSE,
    legend.position = c("center", "bottom"),
    legend.title.show = FALSE    # <- no legend title
  )


```





```{r}


options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
tmap_mode("plot")

# state boundaries
states <- states(cb = TRUE, resolution = "20m", year = 2022)

# contiguous US only
states48 <- states[!states$STUSPS %in% c("AK", "HI"), ]

# California
california <- states48[states48$STUSPS == "CA", ]

# site colors (exact name match)
site_cols <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island" = "#386641",
  "Sedgwick Reserve"  = "orange4"
)

# site shapes
site_shapes <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island" = 21,
  "Sedgwick Reserve"  = 24
)

tm_shape(states48) +
  tm_fill(col = "gray92") +
  tm_borders(col = "white", lwd = 0.3) +

  tm_shape(california) +
  tm_fill(col = "gray85") +
  tm_borders(col = "black", lwd = 1.3) +

  tm_shape(sites_sf) +
  tm_symbols(
    fill = "site",
    shape = "site",
    fill.scale  = tm_scale(values = site_cols),
    shape.scale = tm_scale(values = site_shapes),
    size = 0.6,
    legend.shape.show = FALSE
  ) +

  tm_scale_bar(position = c("left", "bottom"), text.size = 0.7) +
  tm_compass(type = "arrow", position = c("right", "top"), size = 2) +

  tm_layout(
    frame = FALSE,
    legend.position = c("center", "bottom"),
    legend.title.show = FALSE
  )

```



```{r}

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

# states
states_sf <- states(cb = TRUE, resolution = "20m", year = 2022)
states48_sf <- states_sf[!states_sf$STUSPS %in% c("AK", "HI"), ]
california_sf <- states48_sf[states48_sf$STUSPS == "CA", ]

# convert to terra
states48 <- vect(states48_sf)
california <- vect(california_sf)
sites <- vect(c("Sedgwick Reserve", "Santa Cruz Island Reserve")),

site_cols <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island" = "#386641",
  "Sedgwick Reserve"  = "orange4"
)

site_pch <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island" = 21,  # filled circle
  "Sedgwick Reserve"  = 24   # filled triangle
)


# open plotting window
plot(states48,
     col = "gray92",
     border = "white",
     lwd = 0.5)

# emphasize California
plot(california,
     col = "gray85",
     border = "black",
     lwd = 2,
     add = TRUE)

# plot sites (loop keeps control explicit)
for (i in seq_len(nrow(sites))) {
  s <- sites[i]
  nm <- s$site
  points(
    geom(s)[,1],
    geom(s)[,2],
    pch = site_pch[nm],
    bg  = site_cols[nm],
    col = "black",
    cex = 1.2
  )
}

# scale bar (km)
sbar(d = 500, below = "km", cex = 0.8)

# north arrow
north()


legend(
  "bottom",
  legend = names(site_cols),
  pt.bg = site_cols,
  pch = site_pch,
  bty = "n",
  ncol = 2
)


```

```{r}

# cache census data
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

# ----------------------------
# 1. State boundaries
# ----------------------------
states <- states(cb = TRUE, resolution = "20m", year = 2022)

# contiguous US only
states48 <- states[!states$STUSPS %in% c("AK", "HI"), ]

# California
california <- states48[states48$STUSPS == "CA", ]

# ----------------------------
# 2. Site data (created here)
# ----------------------------
sites_df <- data.frame(
  site = c(
    "Santa Cruz Island Reserve",
    "Sedgwick Reserve"
  ),
  lon = c(
    -119.73,   # Santa Cruz Island Reserve
    -120.04    # Sedgwick Reserve
  ),
  lat = c(
    34.00,
    34.70
  )
)

# convert to sf using SAME CRS as states (important)
sites_sf <- st_as_sf(
  sites_df,
  coords = c("lon", "lat"),
  crs = st_crs(states48)
)

# ----------------------------
# 3. Colors and shapes
# ----------------------------
site_cols <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island Reserve" = "#386641",
  "Sedgwick Reserve"          = "orange4"
)

site_shapes <- c(
  "Santa Cruz Island Reserve" = 21,  # filled circle
  "Sedgwick Reserve"          = 24   # filled triangle
)

# ----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot() +

  # US background
  geom_sf(
    data = states48,
    fill = "gray82",
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) +

  # California emphasis
  geom_sf(
    data = california,
    fill = "white",
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +

  # Sites
 geom_sf(
  data = sites_sf,
  aes(shape = site),
  fill = NA,
  color = "black",
  size = 2.9,
  stroke = 0.8
) +
# filled layer
geom_sf(
  data = sites_sf,
  aes(fill = site, shape = site),
  color = "black",
  size = 2.9,
  stroke = 0.8
  ) +

  # California label
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = -120,
    y = 37.5,
    label = "California",
    angle = -55,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "gray30",
    fontface = "italic"
  ) +

  # Scales
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_cols) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = site_shapes) +

  # Scale bar
annotation_scale(
  location = "bl",
  width_hint = 0.03,
  pad_x = unit(0.8, "cm"),
  pad_y = unit(0.8, "cm"),
  text_cex = 0.7
) +

# north arrow (just above scale bar)
annotation_north_arrow(
  location = "bl",
  which_north = "true",
  style = north_arrow_fancy_orienteering,
  height = unit(0.9, "cm"),
  width = unit(0.9, "cm"),
  pad_x = unit(0.9, "cm"),
  pad_y = unit(1.2, "cm")
) +

  # Map extent
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-128, -65), 
    ylim = c(24, 50),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +

  # Clean theme
  theme_void(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm"),
   legend.position = c(0.25,0.06),
   legend.justification = c("bottom"),
    legend.direction = "vertical", 
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.title = element_blank()
    )



```
